memes.description: The whisky bottle as a symbol of William Marble's despair and Annie Marble's alcoholism in Payment Deferred, tracking the family's moral decline through their relationship with drink.

memes.label: The Whisky Decanter
memes.description: The whisky decanter in the sideboard at 53 Malcolm Road — William Marble's 'only friend' and a symbol of his escapism

memes.label: The Whisky Glass
memes.description: The whisky glass that plays a crucial role in the murder of James Medland, serving as both a prop in William Marble's hospitality and the vessel for the poisoned drink.

memes.label: The Wristwatch
memes.description: William Marble's platinum wristwatch — a luxury accessory that signals his financial aspirations in C.S. Forester's *Payment Deferred* (1926).

memes.label: Tilbury
memes.description: Tilbury Docks where Medland's ship the Malina arrives — the point of entry that brings the novel's catalyst to England

memes.label: Trafalgar Square
memes.description: Trafalgar Square, where Medland finds a bus to Dulwich after arriving in London — the portal between metropolitan and suburban worlds

memes.label: Wealth and Status in Payment Deferred
memes.description: The role of wealth, social status, and financial desperation as driving forces in C. S. Forester's Payment Deferred, centering on William Marble's obsessive pursuit of money and the disastrous consequences that follow.

memes.label: William Marble
memes.description: William Marble — bank clerk, murderer, and currency speculator — the protagonist of C. S. Forester's "Payment Deferred"

memes.label: Winnie Marble
memes.description: Winnie Marble — William Marble's sharp-featured daughter who grows from domestic observer into cold-eyed survivor and ultimate financial inheritor in C. S. Forester's "Payment Deferred"

memes.label: Winnie Marble Sr.
memes.description: Winnie Marble Sr. — William Marble's deceased sister and James Medland's mother, whose death in Australia sets her son's fatal journey to England in motion in C. S. Forester's "Payment Deferred"
